system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). Return strict JSON: {"language": str, "subject": str, "body": str (multi-line)}. Do not invent commitments — only confirm what is in the action context. If the request is a work-order status inquiry, translate internal status codes into customer-friendly language and end with a Keysight Standard Procedure (KSP) reassurance — e.g. 'in_progress' → 'Our field team has begun the calibration and you can expect a status update by <date>.', 'scheduled' → 'The work is on our schedule for <date>; our team will reach out 48 hours in advance.', 'open' → 'The work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA.'

raw_response:
{"language": "en", "subject": "Re: PO PO-VERTEX-Q-053-56735 — Precision Source/Measure Unit — please acknowledge", "body": "Dear Vertex Quantum Research Lab Operations team,

Thank you for your purchase order. We are pleased to acknowledge receipt and confirm that PO-VERTEX-Q-053-56735 has been entered into our system (Salesforce Order #00000113, status: Activated).

Order summary:
- PO Number: PO-VERTEX-Q-053-56735
- Customer: Vertex Quantum Research
- Line item: 1 x B2902B — Precision Source/Measure Unit, 2-Ch, 10 fA / 100 nV @ $8,400.00
- Order total: $8,400.00
- Payment terms: Net 45
- Requested ship date: 2026-05-22

We have noted your request to coordinate export documentation through your Trade Compliance team and will keep them copied on related correspondence. All shipments and invoices will reference the PO number on packing slips as requested.

If you have any questions or need additional details, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps"}

parsed.subject: Re: PO PO-VERTEX-Q-053-56735 — Precision Source/Measure Unit — please acknowledge
parsed.body:
Dear Vertex Quantum Research Lab Operations team,

Thank you for your purchase order. We are pleased to acknowledge receipt and confirm that PO-VERTEX-Q-053-56735 has been entered into our system (Salesforce Order #00000113, status: Activated).

Order summary:
- PO Number: PO-VERTEX-Q-053-56735
- Customer: Vertex Quantum Research
- Line item: 1 x B2902B — Precision Source/Measure Unit, 2-Ch, 10 fA / 100 nV @ $8,400.00
- Order total: $8,400.00
- Payment terms: Net 45
- Requested ship date: 2026-05-22

We have noted your request to coordinate export documentation through your Trade Compliance team and will keep them copied on related correspondence. All shipments and invoices will reference the PO number on packing slips as requested.

If you have any questions or need additional details, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps
